listPage.title: My Experience
listPage.description: Your professional history — the source of truth for all generated outputs.
listPage.loadError: Failed to load your experience. Please refresh the page.

emptyState.title: No experience yet
emptyState.description: Add your first work experience. Everything else — resumes, cover letters, interview prep — starts here.

listPage.summary: {count, plural, one {# position} other {# positions}} · {months} months total

newPage.title: Add experience
newPage.description: Add a position to your career knowledge base. Be specific — the AI uses every field.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this experience?
deleteDialog.description: This will permanently remove your experience at {company}. This cannot be undone.

roleSection.title: Role
roleSection.description: The position and company where you worked.

whatYouDidSection.title: What you did
whatYouDidSection.description: The AI uses responsibilities and achievements to craft resume bullets and STAR answers.

form.responsibilitiesDescription: What were your daily duties? Add one per line.
form.achievementsDescription: Quantify where possible. "Reduced render time by 40%."

storySection.title: Story
storySection.description: Used by the AI for interview prep, cover letters, and STAR answers.

form.challengesDescription: What obstacles did you face? How did you overcome them?
form.challengesPlaceholder: We had to deliver photorealistic renders for a 200-seat auditorium within 3 days...
form.starStoryDescription: Situation → Task → Action → Result. The AI turns this into interview answers and cover letter paragraphs.
form.starStoryPlaceholder:
Situation: The client needed to present the project to investors in 48 hours.
Task: I was responsible for the complete interior visualization.
Action: I optimized the render pipeline and worked with the design team to prioritize key angles.
Result: Delivered 12 renders on time. The client closed the deal.
form.portfolioLinksDescription: Behance, Artstation, or any URL showcasing work from this role.
